pipeline: paper-orchestrator (5 stages: outline -> literature -> plot -> writing -> refinement)

citation_stats.verification_source: PubMed (all entries have DOI; authors/titles/journals from PubMed metadata)

round_1.changes: Inlined intro/related work to remove input seam; added Results roadmap paragraph; integrated unused Ambrose2016Replay citation in Discussion.

round_2.changes: Added joint place-x-speed-x-lick analysis subsection (covers previously missing Figure 7 statistics); added sixth Discussion paragraph with quantitative integration; included r=0.62 correlation and 43%/31% & 15%/3% chi2 results from experimental log.

numeric_fidelity_check: All numeric claims in main.tex cross-checked against inputs/idea_summary.md statistical_sentences (e.g., 169/444=38%, 1581/4928=32%, p=0.012; speed-inhibited 15%/21% p=0.00022; lick-excited 3.8%/7.4% p<0.001; conjunctive 44%/19% p<0.001; opto ChR2 mouth t(3)=7.485 p=0.00494; velocity t(3)=-3.551 p=0.0381).
anti_leakage_check: All cited sources verified via PubMed search; no URLs or email addresses from memory; all content traces to inputs/ or verified .bib entries.
